reviews.review_description:
This app originally wouldn’t start for me so I posted a negative review. As you can see by the developer’s response below, they fixed it in the summer of 2025. 
It now works great. 
Very nice videos and overall a nice app.
Thanks for making this app better.

I liked
 this app this. Thought the 360 animation was amazing...But the app keeps re installing itself without permission. never had an app behave like this so rating 1 star .very strange. If they can fix this I will happily give it a better rating but for now I think it might be unsafe to download .

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks a lot for your feedback and for appreciating the 360 animation experience — it means 
a lot to us 
We wanted to let you know that the issue you reported has been fully resolved!
The app no longer reinstalls itself, and you can now enjoy a smooth, stable experience without 
any unexpected behavior.
In addition, we’ve made some exciting updates:
�
Controller (joypad) support is now available!
�
New immersive experiences have been added to enrich your journey as a Guardian of 
Earth.
We’d love for you to give it another try and update your review if you enjoy the improvements. 
Your support helps us grow and bring even more magic to Guardians of Earth!

reviews.review_description: But before I even got to it, I had problems with the very start of the game. Pulling the left hand menu is very hard, sometimes nearly impossible. It is not very intuitive that the button-looking tiles on the screen are not meant to be pushed, but you need to pull the menu from the left hand and push the buttons there, which rarely works. I tried many times until I finally succeeded to start the game. It should be fixed because it's a real obstacle.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you so much for your kind words about the 360° video — we’re thrilled you enjoyed it!
We really appreciate your detailed feedback on the menu interaction at the start of the game. 
You're absolutely right — that part wasn’t as intuitive or responsive as it should have been.
We’re happy to share that we’ve since improved the menu mechanics to make them much more 
fluid and accessible, especially the left-hand pull gesture. On top of that:
Joypad/controller support is now available, giving players a more comfortable way to 
navigate.
We've also redesigned the onboarding to make the start of the experience clearer and 
●
●
smoother.
And we've added new immersive environments to explore.
Your feedback was spot on and helped us make the app better. We’d love for you to revisit 
Guardians of Earth and see what’s new — and of course, feel free to share any more thoughts!
Thanks again!

reviews.review_title: A must-have for a space enthusiast
reviews.review_description:
If you're into space, you've got to check out the Guardians of Earth app. It's a fun and interactive way to dive into the European Space Agency's planetary defense mission, Hera. The app offers two main kinds of experiences:

First, you can play around with a virtual model of the Hera spacecraft using augmented reality. But the part I prefer is the immersive 360-degree video that takes you along Hera's journey to the asteroid Didymos. And, as a Queen fan, the fact that it's narrated by the legendary Brian May is a huge plus!

The app is free, so I totally recommend giving it a try.

reviews.review_title: Cannot get past the first screen
reviews.review_description: The app doesn't recognise my hands properly. Start menu never appears when I turn me left hand.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for your feedback — and sorry for the trouble at the start.
We’ve fixed the hand-tracking issues you described. 
The start menu now appears correctly, and you can use joypads/controllers for easier navigation.
We’ve also added new experiences and improved overall stability. We hope you’ll give Guardians 
of Earth another try!

reviews.review_description:
The cost of purchasing the headset is worth it for this app alone. You really feel as though you’re in space, to be able to handle and even construct the satellite is just awesome. 
Amazing.

As a space geek and proud Meta Quest 3 enthusiast, Guardians of Earth is hands-down one of the most immersive and thrilling VR experiences I’ve ever encountered. Guardians of Earth is a breathtaking VR experience which tells about the ESA mission and combines stunning 360 video and strategic skill game. The ability to open an interactive holographic menu by rotating your left arm with the palm facing up is a standout feature, making you feel like a true space commander. A must-have for space enthusiasts and VR gamers alike.
